visual_description: A lone figure in dark winter clothing slides down a steep, snow‑covered slope at night, illuminated by distant streetlights. The figure loses balance, falls onto the snow, then regains footing and stands upright. The scene is set beside a building with a staircase on the right, enveloped in fog.
audio_description: The audio is quiet, with only faint ambient wind audible.
